stories.title: The Knicks are deserving champs, but their path to...
stories.summary: The New York Knicks, after 53 years of waiting, are finally NBA champions again.

stories.title: Knicks cap brilliant run with long-awaited NBA tit...
stories.summary: During a postseason in which comeback victories had become their specialty, the Knicks completed one of the most dominant playoff runs in NBA history with a title-clinching 94-90 win over the Spurs.

stories.title: Wemby: Losing in Finals 'biggest lesson of my life...
stories.summary: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama says he is "not running away" from the pain of losing to the Knicks in the NBA Finals, calling the experience "the biggest learning moment" of his life.

stories.title: Euphoric fans celebrate Knicks' title across NYC
stories.summary: It was bedlam on Broadway as the Knicks won their first NBA championship in 53 years.

stories.title: Former defensive lineman Aldon Smith dies at 36
stories.summary: Aldon Smith, who played six seasons in the NFL with the 49ers, Raiders and Cowboys, has died at age 36.
